## Summary

## Scope

- [ ] FDC1004 direct CDC only
- [ ] FDC2x1x resonant LC only
- [ ] Shared metadata/core
- [ ] Documentation only

## Checks

- [ ] `tools/clean_package_check.sh`
- [ ] `tools/claim_safety_scan.sh`
- [ ] `scripts/architecture_contract_scan.sh`
- [ ] `tools/host_smoke_compile.sh`

## Claim safety

- [ ] No safety, field, product, or actuator claims added
- [ ] Hardware validation status is not overstated

## Clean-room policy

- [ ] No third-party code/text/test/example/API-shape/file-layout/naming-pattern reuse without documented approval
